description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden stock, handguard, and pistol grip, all finished in a mottled brown and yellow camouflage pattern. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal, providing a stark contrast to the wood components. The rifle is equipped with a curved detachable magazine, also camouflaged to match the stock and handguard. Iron sights are mounted on the top of the barrel and receiver, with the front sight post and rear notch clearly visible. The muzzle end of the barrel is fitted with a simple, unadorned tip, lacking any advanced muzzle device. The overall build suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban environments where concealment and reliability are important.
description: A camouflaged rifle with a wooden stock, handguard, and grip, paired with a dark metal receiver and barrel, and a curved detachable magazine. Iron sights and a simple muzzle complete its utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the barrel's end, front sight post, and a narrow profile of the handguard and stock.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the wooden stock, handguard, pistol grip, curved magazine, and the iron sights along the top.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the butt of the stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel, with the magazine's curve visible below.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the wooden components, metal receiver, and the full length of the barrel and magazine.
